intro: Desideria incana, commonly known as Desideria or Hoary Desideria, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions like coughs, colds, and skin irritations. Bioactive constituents of Desideria incana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the most common herbal preparations being a decoction of the roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various respiratory and skin-related issues.
